category_sources: source_facts.description: Migrate C code to Rust.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is c2rust; source_facts.homepage is the official C2Rust site.
docs_sources: Official C2Rust site provides the manual; source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository with README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C-to-Rust migration; source_facts.executables includes c2rust-transpile.
